description_long: This is a compact, tactical-style rifle with a predominantly matte black finish, featuring a short barrel and a robust cylindrical body. The rifle is equipped with a pistol grip for ergonomic handling and a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail, suggesting it is designed for precision targeting. The front end of the rifle is fitted with a tubular barrel, and there is a visible magazine well beneath the main body, though the magazine itself is not clearly visible. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components likely used for the grip and possibly the sight housing. The rifle's design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. Its compact size and tactical features make it suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a pistol grip and mounted optical sight, designed for precision and maneuverability. The rifle features a short barrel and robust construction, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, pistol grip, mounted sight, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the pistol grip, trigger area, and the side profile of the mounted sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, sight, and the cylindrical body of the rifle.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the barrel opening, sight, and the compactness of the rifle.
